testcase.name: test_alertas_stock_incluir_ignorados
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_alertas_stock.py:107: in test_alertas_stock_incluir_ignorados assert response_with.status_code == 200 E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_toggle_ignorar_alerta
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_alertas_stock.py:135: in test_toggle_ignorar_alerta assert toggle_response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {toggle_response.status_code}: {toggle_response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 503: {"detail":"Conexión con la base de datos perdida. Intente de nuevo."} E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_stats_includes_alertas_stock
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_alertas_stock.py:164: in test_stats_includes_alertas_stock assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 503: {"detail":"Conexión con la base de datos perdida. Intente de nuevo."} E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code
